creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
I tried graphics/drm-next-kmod-4.11.g20180224 on FreeBSD head r329895.
It seems everything works perfectly, but I had a little problem.

HDMI audio won't resume after display resumed.

`xset q` shows as follows.

```
DPMS (Energy Star):
  Standby: 600    Suspend: 600    Off: 600
  DPMS is Enabled
  Monitor is On
```

I don't use xscreensaver.
